name: AWS Account Verification
description: Amazon Web Services account verification request due to suspicious activity.
subject: AWS Account Alert: Verify Your Identity to Prevent Suspension
html:
aws

Account Verification Required

Dear {{.FirstName}},

We have detected unusual activity on the AWS account associated with {{.Email}}. For the security of your organization's cloud resources, we need you to verify your identity immediately.

Account: {{.Email}}
Organization: {{.OrgName}}
Action Required: Identity Verification

Failure to verify within 24 hours may result in temporary account suspension.

Verify My Account
Amazon Web Services • On behalf of {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Azure Subscription Renewal
description: Microsoft Azure subscription renewal notice with payment update required.
subject: Microsoft Azure: Subscription Renewal Action Required
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

Your Microsoft Azure subscription for {{.OrgName}} is approaching its renewal date on {{.Date}}. To ensure uninterrupted access to your cloud services, please review and confirm your subscription details.

Review subscription: {{.URL}}

Microsoft Azure Team
html:
Microsoft Azure

Subscription Renewal Required

Dear {{.FirstName}},

Your Microsoft Azure subscription for {{.OrgName}} is approaching its renewal date on {{.Date}}. To ensure uninterrupted access to your cloud services, virtual machines, and databases, please review and confirm your subscription details.

Subscription: {{.OrgName}} Enterprise
Renewal Date: {{.Date}}
Admin: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
Review Subscription
Microsoft Azure • Cloud Services
{{.Tracker}}

name: Google Cloud Billing Alert
description: Google Cloud Platform billing alert indicating budget threshold exceeded.
subject: Google Cloud: Budget Alert - 90% Threshold Exceeded for {{.OrgName}}
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Google Cloud Platform project for {{.OrgName}} has exceeded 90% of the configured budget. Please review your current usage and billing details to avoid service interruptions.

Review billing: {{.URL}}

Google Cloud Platform
html:
Google Cloud

Budget Alert: 90% Threshold Exceeded

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Google Cloud Platform project for {{.OrgName}} has exceeded 90% of the configured monthly budget. Continued usage at this rate may result in additional charges or service interruptions.

Project: {{.OrgName}}-prod
Budget Period: Monthly
Threshold: 90% exceeded
Billing Admin: {{.Email}}
Review Billing Details
Google Cloud Platform
{{.Tracker}}

name: Dropbox Storage Space Limit
description: Dropbox notification that the user is approaching their storage limit.
subject: Dropbox: You're Almost Out of Storage Space
html:
Dropbox Business

You're Almost Out of Storage

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Dropbox Business account is almost full. You've used 95% of your allocated storage space. Once you reach your limit, file syncing will stop and you won't be able to upload new files.

95% of storage used

Manage Storage
Dropbox Business • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Box.com Shared Folder Invitation
description: Box.com notification that a colleague has shared a folder with the user.
subject: A folder has been shared with you on Box
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

A colleague at {{.OrgName}} has shared a folder with you on Box:

Folder: "Q4 Financial Reports - Confidential"
Shared by: Finance Department
Access Level: Editor

name: iCloud Storage Full
description: Apple iCloud notification that the user's storage is full.
subject: Your iCloud Storage Is Full
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your iCloud storage is full. Photos, documents, and device backups can no longer be updated until you free up space or upgrade your storage plan.

Manage your iCloud storage: {{.URL}}

Apple iCloud
html:
iCloud

Your iCloud Storage Is Full

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your iCloud storage is full. This means your photos, documents, and device backups can no longer be updated until you either free up space or upgrade your storage plan.

5 GB of 5 GB used

Manage Storage
Apple iCloud
{{.Tracker}}

name: OneDrive Sync Error
description: Microsoft OneDrive notification about file sync errors requiring user action.
subject: OneDrive: File Sync Errors Detected - Action Required
html:
OneDrive for Business

File Sync Errors Detected

Hi {{.FirstName}},

OneDrive has encountered sync errors with several of your files. The following issues were detected:

Files with conflicts4
Files pending upload7
Last successful sync3 days ago
Resolve Sync Issues
Microsoft OneDrive • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Salesforce Password Reset
description: Salesforce password reset notification triggered by security policy.
subject: Salesforce: Password Reset Required Due to Security Policy
html:
Salesforce

Password Reset Required

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Per the security policy for {{.OrgName}}, your Salesforce password must be reset. Your current password has been active for more than 90 days and no longer meets our security requirements.

Username: {{.Email}}
Reason: 90-day password rotation policy
Deadline: {{.Date}}
Reset Password Now
Salesforce Administration • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: Adobe Creative Cloud License
description: Adobe Creative Cloud license expiration notice requiring renewal action.
subject: Adobe Creative Cloud: Your License Expires on {{.Date}}
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Adobe Creative Cloud license assigned by {{.OrgName}} is expiring on {{.Date}}. To continue using Photoshop, Illustrator, and other Creative Cloud applications, please renew your license.

Renew license: {{.URL}}

Adobe Creative Cloud
{{.OrgName}} IT
html:
Adobe Creative Cloud

Your License Is Expiring

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Your Adobe Creative Cloud license assigned by {{.OrgName}} is expiring on {{.Date}}. After this date, you will lose access to the following applications:

  • Adobe Photoshop
  • Adobe Illustrator
  • Adobe InDesign
  • Adobe Premiere Pro
  • All other Creative Cloud apps
Renew License
Adobe Creative Cloud • {{.OrgName}} IT
{{.Tracker}}

name: Zoom Account Upgrade
description: Zoom notification about a free account upgrade to a business plan.
subject: Zoom: Your Account Has Been Upgraded to Business Plan
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Great news! Your Zoom account ({{.Email}}) has been upgraded to Zoom Business by your organization's admin at {{.OrgName}}.

Activate your new features: {{.URL}}

New features include unlimited meeting duration, cloud recording, and admin controls.

Zoom
html:
Zoom

Your Account Has Been Upgraded!

Hi {{.FirstName}},

Great news! Your Zoom account ({{.Email}}) has been upgraded to Zoom Business by your organization's admin at {{.OrgName}}.

Your new features include:

  • Unlimited meeting duration
  • Cloud recording (unlimited storage)
  • Admin dashboard and reporting
  • Custom branding
Activate New Features
Zoom Video Communications
{{.Tracker}}

name: Slack Workspace Migration
description: Slack notification about workspace migration requiring account re-authentication.
subject: Slack: Workspace Migration - Re-authenticate Your Account
html:
Slack

Workspace Migration Notice

Hi {{.FirstName}},

The {{.OrgName}} Slack workspace is being migrated to Slack Enterprise Grid to provide enhanced security, compliance, and administration features.

To maintain access to your channels, messages, and files, you must re-authenticate your account before the migration deadline.

Account: {{.Email}}
Current Workspace: {{.OrgName}}
New Platform: Slack Enterprise Grid
Migration Deadline: {{.Date}}
Re-authenticate Account

All existing messages and files will be preserved during the migration process.

Slack Administration • {{.OrgName}}
{{.Tracker}}

name: GitHub Repository Access
description: GitHub notification granting access to a private repository.
subject: GitHub: You've been added to the repository {{.OrgName}}/internal-tools
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

You've been added as a collaborator to the private repository {{.OrgName}}/internal-tools on GitHub.

Access Level: Write
Added by: DevOps Team

View the repository: {{.URL}}

GitHub
html:
GitHub

Repository Access Granted

Hi @{{.FirstName}},

You've been added as a collaborator to the private repository:

{{.OrgName}}/internal-tools

Access Level: Write
Added by: DevOps Team
Visibility: Private
View Repository

You're receiving this because you were granted access to the repository. To manage your notification settings, visit your GitHub profile.

GitHub, Inc.
{{.Tracker}}
